151cd315.transcript: Hey Harby, this is for a song called Monastery. Religion is accustomary, so tell me why I only ever pray what I'm nervous. I don't even love your baby like all my other passions I've left you deserted.

db593e95.transcript: This is from Monastery. Religion is a custom-marry. Tell me why I only ever pray when I'm nervous. I don't even love you, baby. Like all my other passions I've left you deserted. Take me to a monastery so I can light a candle and then ask for a tonement.
